violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied and put out of service at the time of inspection. Per PIC, ice machine will be replaced, and invoice will be sent to inspector. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Crab legs were observed in direct contact with adulterated ice. Crab legs were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery, deli, seafood area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The gasket for the seafood 2-door reach-in was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -The deli display case grates -Deli hot hold gaskets -The pet isle shelving -Honeycombs at the hot dog case -Deli freezer fan guards -Deli walk-in fan guards Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight to touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

The grout in the bakery, and deli area is in poor repair. The ceiling tiles above the ice machine in the seafood department is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The floor under the produce shelves, and floor under the deli sandwich unit has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
